leadText: An Apicot Berry (Japanese: ズアのみ Zua Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] An Apicot Berry raises the holder's Special Defense by one stage when the holder's HP drop to ¼ or below. If the holder has Gluttony , then it eats its Apicot Berry when its HP drops to ½ or below. If the holder has Ripen , then its Special Defense rises by two stages. When forcibly consumed via Fling , Pluck , Bug Bite , Teatime , or Item Urge , it raises the Special Defense of the consumer by one stage. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending R S E When blending with NPCs, Apicot Berries will produce the following Pokéblocks : NPC NPCs' Berries Flavors ( 100 RPM ) Feel 1 NPC Sourness 62, Dryness 49 50 2 NPCs Sourness 62, Dryness 62 40 3 NPCs Sourness 62, Dryness 49, Sweetness 10 34 Blend Master Sourness 88, Dryness 49 73 OR AS Apicot Berries are blue Berries that have a medium-high chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Berry Crush FR LG E Apicot Berries have a base Berry Powder of 500 and a difficulty of 180. With two players, this Berry will contribute 1000 units of Berry Powder at 100% silkiness. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Apicot Berries will produce Poffins with Dryness 28, Sourness 18 and smoothness 39 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Apicot Berries are blue Berries in Group 3. Composting X Y Apicot Berries are blue Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 15 Apicot Berries, Kelpsy Berries , and Chesto Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into pastel navy blue. Curry Sw Sh Apicot Berries have a rarity of 10. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Apicot Berries are Ground-type items and give 12 points towards the output value.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Event FR LG Event Colo XD Mt. Battle (15,000 Poké Coupons ) D P Pt Trade HG SS Transfer from Pokéwalker PW Volcano Path PBR Shop (19200 Poké Coupons , after completing Stargazer Colosseum ) B W Trade B2 W2 Join Avenue ( Flower Shop ) X Y Mutation of Kelpsy and Wacan Berries OR AS Super-Secret Base (Gather Berries skill) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 1) S M US UM Berry piles ( Secluded Shore S M / Ula'ula Beach US UM ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Route 9 , Dappled Grove , Giant's Cap , Lake of Outrage ) Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Soothing Wetlands ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Bed ) BD SP Ramanas Park (Soul Room) Picked up by walking Pokémon (Lonely, Docile, Timid, Quiet, Bashful, Calm, Gentle, Careful Natures ) S V Alfornada ( Emotional Spectrum Practice ) Sparkling overworld item ( Area Zero ) S V TM Sparkling overworld item ( Kitakami Wilds , Timeless Woods ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period R S Pokémon Box Ruby & Sapphire Promotion Seviper United States July 10 to 16, 2004 R S FR LG 2004 Tanabata Jirachi Japanese July 1 to 7, 2004 July 17 to August 15, 2004 R S E FR LG 2005 Tanabata Jirachi Japanese July 17 to August 21, 2005

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A hold item that raises Sp.Def in a pinch. FR LG When held by a Pok é mon , it raises the Sp. Def stat in a pinch. Colo XD A hold item that raises Sp.Def in a pinch. D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. If held by a Pokémon, it raises its Sp. Def stat in a pinch. HG SS B W B2 W2 If held by a Pokémon, it raises its Sp. Def stat in a pinch. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, its Sp. Def stat will increase when it's in a pinch. S V If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, its Sp. Def stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 40 R S E FR LG / No. 57 D P Pt BD SP Size: 3.0" (7.5 cm) Firmness: Very hard Games Description R S E A very mystifying Berry . No telling what may happen or how it can be used. D P Pt BD SP This is a very, very mystifying Berry. There is no telling how it can be used, or what may happen if it is used. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A slightly rare Berry. Its blue part has a very dry flavor and its green part has a very sour flavor.

Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 24 hours Taller 48 hours Flowering 72 hours Berries 96 hours An Apicot plant will yield 1-5 Berries. A growing Apicot plant's soil dries by 4% every hour, fully drying out in 25 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 36 hours Taller 72 hours Flowering 108 hours Berries 144 hours An Apicot plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 16 hours Growing 32 hours Bigger 48 hours Budding 64 hours Bloom 80 hours Berries 96 hours An Apicot plant will yield 1-10 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 0.2 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.1, and removing a pest adds 1. Apicot plants attract Volbeat as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Taller 24 hours Flowering 36 hours Berries 48 hours An Apicot plant will yield 2-13 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 54 hours Taller 60 hours Flowering 68 hours Berries 72 hours An Apicot plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 5 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 8 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 24 hours Taller 48 hours Flowering 72 hours Berries 96 hours An Apicot plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
